SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Misc

Class Config

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Misc.Config
public final class Config extends Object
Loads and saves the persistent application configuration.

The config file keeps palette data, host theme values, control bindings, shortcut bindings, sound options, and simple window preferences. The class is stateful by design so the rest of the application can request a load once and then work with in-memory settings.
